name: www.tecnoelectric.com.py
message: Tecno Electric S.A. is a specialist in energy solutions for buildings, industry, and homes across Paraguay, boasting over 55 years of experience. They offer comprehensive solutions for generating, transmitting, and utilizing energy safely, efficiently, and productively. Their intended clients include residential, industrial, and commercial sectors looking for reliable energy management. The company aims to form strategic alliances to enhance energy solutions in the region.
